entries.title: Commentary on Lamentations on lamentations 3:36
entries.excerpt: Third, a perverse intention within divine justice is also excluded. Like to those judges, under a guise of justice, intend to oppress some persons. "To subvert a man in his cause, the Lord does not approve." That is, from judgment: "the Lord does not approve." As Proverbs 4:27 admonishes: "Do not swerve to the right or to the left; turn your foot away from evil."
